name: Feedback-Coupled Memory Systems in Continuous Time
content: The Feedback-Coupled Memory Systems (FCMS) architecture formalizes closed-loop coordination through four abstract operators, two of which - the agent update operator $f_i$ and the environmental update operator $Ψ$ - are left axiomatically undefined in the original framework. To address this, $f_i$ is defined by Mechanism-Based Intelligence (MBI), where agents update locally through a decentralized price mechanism and economic principles, and $Ψ$ is defined by the Coupled Memory Graph Process (CM
summary: FCMS通过定义两个抽象操作——基于机制智能的agent update operator和耦合记忆图过程的environmental update operator，实现了连续时间下的稳定性条件，并且验证了其在数值模拟和大规模平均场验证中的有效性。
key_insights: FCMS架构通过Lyapunov全局耗散性来实现稳定性，该稳定性由可计算阈值4β² < 2ημγ²控制。
FCMS的稳定性条件扩展了离散FCMS和CMGP的物理分岔阈值，并确认记忆衰减必须超过反馈增益作为普遍组织原则。
数值模拟与大规模平均场验证证实了稳定性阈值，以及当违反稳定性条件时出现自强化协调级联的现象。
xihe_relevance: FCMS架构在曦和框架下的应用潜力巨大，特别是在记忆系统、自反层和进化引擎等领域。
